name: bing-geo-optimization
description: The Bing/Copilot specialization of marketing-skills:ai-seo, re-weighted using a real Bing Webmaster Tools AI citation export. Keeps ai-seo's three pillars and Princeton GEO methods, then adds the Bing-only mechanics: visible grounding queries, the AI Performance reports, the grounding-query reverse-engineering method, and IndexNow eligibility.
